payload.name: Phase 2 Production Features
payload.description:
PHASE 2 — Production-Grade Features. Build 4 modules:
1) app/multi_agent.py → multi-agent orchestration
2) app/tools_fc.py → function-calling tool system
3) app/memory.py → Chroma-based long-term memory
4) app/repo_map.py → auto-build AGENTS.md
Plus integration into graph.py and cli.py. Apply and test.

Note for scoping: app/ already contains memory.py, tools.py, tool_calls.py, orchestrator.py, agents.py — decisions needed on extend vs replace, framework (LangGraph or plain?), LLM provider, Chroma install path, function-calling schema style (OpenAI/Anthropic/generic).
